selection_basis.ledger_reason: Parent batch was the strongest remaining low-entropy systemv3 sibling on the controller action board.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the late stage2/public/conformance packet into controller-usable delivery, schema, conformance, and public-boundary fences.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Best next active-A2 sibling after the late-stage delivery packet is narrowed.
Best archaeology follow-on once the remaining low-entropy systemv3 packet is reduced.

raw_source_reread_reason: Parent artifacts already isolate the late-stage delivery, controller, schema, conformance, and public-boundary clusters needed for this bounded reduction.

candidate_items.name: DELIVERY_GATE_STACK_BEFORE_PROMOTION
candidate_items.why_candidate: Provides the controller with a compact late-stage promotion gate stack rather than a broad release packet.

candidate_items.name: PROVISIONAL_CONTROLLER_PROCESS_USE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the controller process as active but revisable rather than fixed architecture.

candidate_items.name: CONFORMANCE_VECTOR_DRIFT_SIGNATURE_CAPTURE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns the fixture-tag mismatch into a small explicit drift signal the controller can track.

candidate_items.name: SCHEMA_STUBS_ARE_NOT_ENFORCEMENT
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps schema and browser hardening declarations useful without overstating implementation completeness.

candidate_items.name: PUBLIC_BOUNDARY_OVERLAY_BELOW_INTERNAL_BOOTSET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves public-facing explanations as overlays below thicker internal boot and control surfaces.

quarantined_items.name: WORK_PATH_STAGE3_AS_CURRENT_WRITE_POSTURE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Late-stage work-path examples are not yet reconciled with the cleaner current write posture.

quarantined_items.name: PUBLIC_HOSTING_AND_BROWSER_PATH_AS_KERNEL_AUTHORITY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Public hosting overlays and browser-mediated paths must not self-promote into kernel or internal control authority.

notes: This batch was produced after the active control-spine reduction as the next low-entropy controller-facing stage2/public reduction.
No raw source reread and no active A2 append-save were performed.
